window_text:
janmādyasya yato 'nvayāditarataścārtheṣvabhijñaḥ svarāṭ $ tene brahma hṛdā ya ādikavaye muhyanti yat sūrayaḥ &tejovārimṛdāṃ yathā vinimayo yatra trisargo 'mṛṣā % dhāmnā svena sadā nirastakuhakaṃ satyaṃ paraṃ dhīmahi । bhp_01.01.001* । dharmaḥ projjhitakaitavo 'tra paramo nirmatsarāṇāṃ satāṃ $ vedyaṃ vāstavam atra vastu śivadaṃ tāpatrayonmūlanam &dharmaḥ projjhitakaitavo 'tra paramo nirmatsarāṇāṃ satāṃ $ vedyaṃ vāstavam atra vastu śivadaṃ tāpatrayonmūlanam &śrīmadbhāgavate mahāmunikṛte kiṃ vā parairīśvaraḥ % sadyo hṛdyavarudhyate 'tra kṛtibhiḥ śuśrūṣubhistatkṣaṇāt ॥
dharmaḥ projjhitakaitavo 'tra paramo nirmatsarāṇāṃ satāṃ $ vedyaṃ vāstavam atra vastu śivadaṃ tāpatrayonmūlanam &dharmaḥ projjhitakaitavo 'tra paramo nirmatsarāṇāṃ satāṃ $ vedyaṃ vāstavam atra vastu śivadaṃ tāpatrayonmūlanam &śrīmadbhāgavate mahāmunikṛte kiṃ vā parairīśvaraḥ % sadyo hṛdyavarudhyate 'tra kṛtibhiḥ śuśrūṣubhistatkṣaṇāt । bhp_01.01.002* । nigamakalpatarorgalitaṃ phalaṃ $ śukamukhādamṛtadravasaṃyutam &nigamakalpatarorgalitaṃ phalaṃ $ śukamukhādamṛtadravasaṃyutam &pibata bhāgavataṃ rasam ālayaṃ % muhuraho rasikā bhuvi bhāvukāḥ ॥
nigamakalpatarorgalitaṃ phalaṃ $ śukamukhādamṛtadravasaṃyutam &nigamakalpatarorgalitaṃ phalaṃ $ śukamukhādamṛtadravasaṃyutam &pibata bhāgavataṃ rasam ālayaṃ % muhuraho rasikā bhuvi bhāvukāḥ । bhp_01.01.003* । naimiṣe 'nimiṣakṣetre īśayaḥ śaunakādayaḥ ॥
naimiṣe 'nimiṣakṣetre īśayaḥ śaunakādayaḥ । satraṃ svargāya lokāya sahasrasamam āsata । bhp_01.01.004 ॥
bhp_01.01.004 । ta ekadā tu munayaḥ prātarhutahutāgnayaḥ । satkṛtaṃ sūtam āsīnaṃ papracchuridam ādarāt ॥
satkṛtaṃ sūtam āsīnaṃ papracchuridam ādarāt । bhp_01.01.005 । bhp_01.01.006 ॥
bhp_01.01.006 । 0 ṛṣaya ūcuḥ । tvayā khalu purāṇāni setihāsāni cānagha ॥
tvayā khalu purāṇāni setihāsāni cānagha । ākhyātānyapyadhītāni dharmaśāstrāṇi yānyuta । bhp_01.01.006 ॥
bhp_01.01.006 । yāni vedavidāṃ śreṣṭho bhagavān bādarāyaṇaḥ । anye ca munayaḥ sūta parāvaravido viduḥ ॥
anye ca munayaḥ sūta parāvaravido viduḥ । bhp_01.01.007 । vettha tvaṃ saumya tat sarvaṃ tattvatastadanugrahāt ॥
vettha tvaṃ saumya tat sarvaṃ tattvatastadanugrahāt । brūyuḥ snigdhasya śiṣyasya guravo guhyam apyuta । bhp_01.01.008 ॥
bhp_01.01.008 । tatra tatrāñjasāyuṣman bhavatā yadviniścitam । puṃsām ekāntataḥ śreyastan naḥ śaṃsitum arhasi ॥
puṃsām ekāntataḥ śreyastan naḥ śaṃsitum arhasi । bhp_01.01.009 । prāyeṇālpāyuṣaḥ sabhya kalāvasmin yuge janāḥ ॥
prāyeṇālpāyuṣaḥ sabhya kalāvasmin yuge janāḥ । mandāḥ sumandamatayo mandabhāgyā hyupadrutāḥ । bhp_01.01.010 ॥
bhp_01.01.010 । bhūrīṇi bhūrikarmāṇi śrotavyāni vibhāgaśaḥ । ataḥ sādho 'tra yat sāraṃ samuddhṛtya manīṣayā ॥
ataḥ sādho 'tra yat sāraṃ samuddhṛtya manīṣayā । brūhi bhadrāya bhūtānāṃ yenātmā suprasīdati । bhp_01.01.011 ॥
bhp_01.01.011 । sūta jānāsi bhadraṃ te bhagavān sātvatāṃ patiḥ । devakyāṃ vasudevasya jāto yasya cikīrṣayā ॥
devakyāṃ vasudevasya jāto yasya cikīrṣayā । bhp_01.01.012 । tan naḥ śuṣrūṣamāṇānām arhasyaṅgānuvarṇitum ॥
tan naḥ śuṣrūṣamāṇānām arhasyaṅgānuvarṇitum । yasyāvatāro bhūtānāṃ kṣemāya ca bhavāya ca । bhp_01.01.013 ॥
bhp_01.01.013 । āpannaḥ saṃsṛtiṃ ghorāṃ yannāma vivaśo gṛṇan । tataḥ sadyo vimucyeta yadbibheti svayaṃ bhayam ॥
tataḥ sadyo vimucyeta yadbibheti svayaṃ bhayam । bhp_01.01.014 । yatpādasaṃśrayāḥ sūta munayaḥ praśamāyanāḥ ॥
yatpādasaṃśrayāḥ sūta munayaḥ praśamāyanāḥ । sadyaḥ punantyupaspṛṣṭāḥ svardhunyāpo 'nusevayā । bhp_01.01.015 ॥
bhp_01.01.015 । ko vā bhagavatastasya puṇyaślokeḍyakarmaṇaḥ । śuddhikāmo na śṛṇuyādyaśaḥ kalimalāpaham ॥
śuddhikāmo na śṛṇuyādyaśaḥ kalimalāpaham । bhp_01.01.016 । tasya karmāṇyudārāṇi parigītāni sūribhiḥ ॥
tasya karmāṇyudārāṇi parigītāni sūribhiḥ । brūhi naḥ śraddadhānānāṃ līlayā dadhataḥ kalāḥ । bhp_01.01.017 ॥
bhp_01.01.017 । athākhyāhi harerdhīmann avatārakathāḥ śubhāḥ । īlā vidadhataḥ svairam īśvarasyātmamāyayā ॥
īlā vidadhataḥ svairam īśvarasyātmamāyayā । bhp_01.01.018 । vayaṃ tu na vitṛpyāma uttamaślokavikrame ॥
vayaṃ tu na vitṛpyāma uttamaślokavikrame । yacchṛṇvatāṃ rasajñānāṃ svādu svādu pade pade । bhp_01.01.019 ॥
bhp_01.01.019 । kṛtavān kila karmāṇi saha rāmeṇa keśavaḥ । atimartyāni bhagavān gūḍhaḥ kapaṭamānuṣaḥ ॥
atimartyāni bhagavān gūḍhaḥ kapaṭamānuṣaḥ । bhp_01.01.020 । kalim āgatam ājñāya kṣetre 'smin vaiṣṇave vayam ॥
kalim āgatam ājñāya kṣetre 'smin vaiṣṇave vayam । āsīnā dīrghasatreṇa kathāyāṃ sakṣaṇā hareḥ । bhp_01.01.021 ॥
bhp_01.01.021 । tvaṃ naḥ sandarśito dhātrā dustaraṃ nistitīrṣatām । kaliṃ sattvaharaṃ puṃsāṃ karṇadhāra ivārṇavam ॥
kaliṃ sattvaharaṃ puṃsāṃ karṇadhāra ivārṇavam । bhp_01.01.022 । brūhi yogeśvare kṛṣṇe brahmaṇye dharmavarmaṇi ॥
brūhi yogeśvare kṛṣṇe brahmaṇye dharmavarmaṇi । svāṃ kāṣṭhām adhunopete dharmaḥ kaṃ śaraṇaṃ gataḥ । bhp_01.01.023 ॥

teachings.teaching: The Srimad Bhagavatam is the mature, nectar-filled fruit of the desire-tree of Vedic literatures, and should be relished repeatedly by thoughtful souls.
teachings.lens_note: Plainly highlights the supreme status of the text itself.

teachings.teaching: In the age of Kali, people are generally short-lived, lazy, misguided, unlucky, and constantly disturbed. Therefore, the essence of all scriptures must be extracted for their welfare.
teachings.lens_note: A realistic assessment of human frailty in the current cosmic age.
